retrieved_note: Verified 2026-05-25 against Faysal Bank Schedule of Charges (Jan-Jun 2026) and Faysal Islami Priority Banking section of the same SOC, with corroborating Noor Card KFS references. Faysal is now a fully Islamic bank (Faysal Islami); product names use the Islamic nomenclature. Faysal product pages are bot-blocked, so card-specific salary tiers were taken from the published KFS distillations (TechJuice, ProPakistani, IWESS) only after confirming the underlying KFS PDF link on faysalbank.com — fee figures themselves are SOC-verified.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 2,500 on spend-based reversal (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC). Published KFS distillations cite a qualifying primary-card spend in the PKR 400,000-1,000,000 range; bank does not publish the exact threshold on the SOC.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 (Section 10 Noor Card) lists primary annual fee Rs. 26,000 and supplementary Rs. 12,500 with reduced fee Rs. 2,500 on spend-based reversal.

KFS distillations consistently cite PKR 500,000 salaried/businessman minimum income for the World tier (TechJuice 2025 guide; ProPakistani Noor World card page). Earlier pilot used a flat PKR 40,000 — corrected to PKR 500,000 because that floor is the World-tier KFS threshold, not the catalogue-wide minimum.
Unsecured income-based card; no minimum account balance disclosed.
Audit-flagged on balance inference — confirmed as income-based, balance left null.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 2,100 on spend-based reversal (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC). KFS distillations cite a qualifying primary-card spend around PKR 200,000.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 lists primary Rs. 19,000 / supplementary Rs. 6,000 / reduced Rs. 2,100 — verified.
Salary floor PKR 200,000 from KFS distillations (TechJuice, ProPakistani, Mawazna).
Audit-flagged on fee — confirmed Rs. 19,000 matches SOC.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 1,100 on spend-based reversal (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC). KFS distillations cite a qualifying primary-card spend around PKR 40,000.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 lists primary Rs. 13,000 / supplementary Rs. 4,000 / reduced Rs. 1,100 — verified.
Salary floor PKR 50,000 from KFS distillations. Earlier pilot used PKR 40,000 — corrected to PKR 50,000 per Titanium-tier KFS.
Age 18-65 per Noor Card KFS / apply portal.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 900 on spend-based reversal (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC). KFS distillations cite a qualifying primary-card spend around PKR 30,000.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 lists primary Rs. 11,000 / supplementary Rs. 2,000 / reduced Rs. 900 — verified.
Salary floor PKR 30,000 per KFS distillations (TechJuice 2025 guide). Earlier pilot used PKR 40,000 — corrected to PKR 30,000 because TechJuice Gold/Velocity row is identical at PKR 30,000.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced to PKR 600 on spend-based reversal (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC). KFS distillations cite a qualifying primary-card spend around PKR 20,000-25,000.

notes: Audit-flagged on fee — SOC Jan-Jun 2026 confirms primary Rs. 6,500 / supplementary Rs. 1,600 / reduced Rs. 600.
Salary floor PKR 30,000 per KFS distillations (entry-tier card).
card_type corrected from null to credit. Velocity is a credit/Tawarruq card in the Noor family.
Audit-flagged on fee — earlier pilot listed PKR 6,500. CORRECTED to PKR 9,000 primary / Rs. 3,500 supplementary per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC Section 12 (Noor Flexi Card, distinct from Noor Card section).
Joining/processing fee Rs. 5,000 non-reversible per SOC.
Noor Flexi is an instalment-style credit card (Musawamah, limit enhancement fee Rs. 3,000) — distinct from Velocity. No spend-based annual fee reversal published.
card_type corrected from null to credit. Salary floor not published separately for Flexi; left null.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Priority World Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Complimentary while Priority Banking eligibility is maintained (NTB: PKR 5Mn CASA / PKR 15Mn Term Deposit at account opening; ETB: PKR 5Mn quarterly average CASA / PKR 15Mn TD). Otherwise quarterly fee of Rs. 4,250 (primary) / Rs. 2,500 (supplementary) applies.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 4 (Faysal Islamic Priority Banking) explicitly lists Priority World Debit threshold: NTB CASA PKR 5Mn / TD PKR 15Mn; ETB CASA PKR 5Mn avg quarterly / TD PKR 15Mn.
Quarterly waiver-failure fee Rs. 4,250 (primary) / Rs. 2,500 (supplementary) per SOC.
Salary route to Priority status: PKR 500,000 gross salary per month (Employee Banking, same SOC section).
Priority status also reachable via AUM PKR 10Mn + PKR 1.5Mn avg quarterly CASA (recorded as relationship balance).

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Priority Platinum Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Complimentary while Priority Banking eligibility is maintained (NTB: PKR 3Mn CA/SA / PKR 5Mn Term Deposit at account opening; ETB: PKR 3Mn quarterly average). Otherwise quarterly fee of Rs. 1,750 (primary) / Rs. 1,500 (supplementary) applies.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 3 (Faysal Islamic Priority Banking eligibility) lists Priority Platinum Debit threshold: NTB CA/SA PKR 3Mn / TD PKR 5Mn; ETB CASA PKR 3Mn avg quarterly.
Quarterly waiver-failure fee Rs. 1,750 (primary) / Rs. 1,500 (supplementary) per SOC.
Salary route to Priority status: PKR 500,000 gross salary per month (Employee Banking).
Earlier pilot used PKR 3Mn account balance and PKR 5Mn deposit — verified.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Amal Gold Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 1.a.xii (Mastercard Amal Gold) primary Rs. 3,300; supplementary Rs. 2,300 (Section 1.b.x).
Inherits eligibility from Amal Women Account family (Saving / Current Remunerative / Priority Plus). No published minimum salary or initial deposit threshold for the base Amal accounts.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Amal Platinum Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 1.a.xi (Mastercard Amal Platinum) primary Rs. 7,000; supplementary Rs. 6,000 (Section 1.b.ix).
Inherits eligibility from the Amal Women Account family.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Classic Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 1.a.v (Mastercard Classic) primary Rs. 2,300; supplementary Rs. 1,600.
Available to all Faysal Bank account holders; no minimum balance or salary published for the base card.
Card replacement Rs. 1,500.

cards.card_name: Faysal Islami Mastercard Gold Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Section 1.a.vi (Mastercard Gold) primary Rs. 3,300; supplementary Rs. 2,300.
Open to all Faysal Bank account holders; no public balance or salary threshold for the base card.

gaps: Faysal Bank product pages (faysalbank.com) return HTTP 403 to programmatic fetchers, so card-specific Noor salary tiers were taken from KFS distillations on KFS-linked third-party pages rather than the raw KFS PDF text — the underlying KFS PDFs on faysalbank.com are cited but not directly readable in this session.

Noor Card spend-based annual fee reversal qualifying spend thresholds are not published in the SOC (only the reduced fee is). Reported spend thresholds (Velocity ~20-25k, Gold ~30k, Titanium ~40k, Platinum ~200k, World 400k-1M) are taken from KFS distillations and earlier KFS evidence and should be confirmed against the current KFS by a human reviewer.
Noor Flexi: card-level salary tier not published separately from the broader Noor income grid; left null.
